Marwa Bakhoor

Musk · Saffron · Oudh · Woods
Warm · Intoxicating · Royal

Named for the sacred hill of Marwa — this bakhoor captures the soul of Arabia. Golden saffron threads, precious oud and warm musk create a fragrance that lingers in memory long after the smoke fades.
